one_time_description: Bad debt expense recognized related to trade receivables allowance increase
economic_notes: First Nation operates business enterprises including Kasabonika SGR GP Inc. and Kasabonika SGR Limited Partnership (modified equity method). Consolidated subsidiaries include Petrokas Ltd., Kasabonika Community Development Corporation, Wechimachida Construction Services (GP) Corporation, and Wechimachida Construction Limited Partnership.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) no budget comparison presented as required by PSAS, and (2) inability to determine completeness of Asset Retirement Obligations under PS 3280. GBEs (Kasabonika SGR GP Inc. and Kasabonika SGR Limited Partnership) use modified equity method with December 31 year-end, creating a 3-month lag. Large deferred revenue balance of $38.1M (up from $10.4M) significantly impacts reported revenue. New financial instruments standard PS 3450 adopted April 1, 2022 prospectively. Remuneration schedule not included in extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue ($64,417,342) minus government transfers (ISC $71,965,852 + Govt of Ontario $3,410,798 + CMHC $473,540 + Ontario Ministry of Northern Development $81,982 + Sioux Lookout $665,732 + NAN $312,759 + Ministry of Health $591,923 = $77,502,586) adjusted for deferred revenue — estimated using gross government transfers before deferral adjustments.
